summary: Public drift exists mainly because robotics.askewly.com is serving the legacy static viewer while local M27/M28 evidence expects the Vite/React workbench and environment QA hooks. Askewly project copy is also stale about G1 squat status. No audited surface overclaims assisted fixture evidence as real robot telemetry.

visibleTextFindings: Panel preserves assisted fixture boundary: not proof of an unassisted humanoid standing controller.
Panel still says G1 squat research is paused until visible-depth and no-fall gates both pass, which is stale after M19.
No visible M27/M28 environment controls were detected in the live text probe.

qaCommands.details: Timed out after 120s on live deploy; hook probe confirms qaWorkbenchSummary is absent.
Timed out after 120s on live deploy; hook probe confirms qaEnvironmentSummary and setEnvironmentPreset are absent.

askewlyProjectPage.currentClaim: G1 squat is still a micro-dip probe.
askewlyProjectPage.expectedClaim: G1 squat has simulated WBC/browser replay evidence, while real robot telemetry remains future work.
askewlyProjectPage.risk: A reviewer will think M19 is still pre-completion even though the repo closed M19 with simulated evidence.

askewlyBlogRobotWalkQa.finding: The article frames robot walking QA generally and does not claim this project has current real-hardware logs.

askewlyG1SquatBlog.finding: The post explicitly says the result is measured MuJoCo WBC trace and browser replay, not real Unitree G1 hardware telemetry.

githubReadme.finding: No real-robot telemetry overclaim found. Top-level wording still emphasizes gallery/policy platform more than M27/M28 workbench/environment controls.

vault.access: ssh m4 succeeded and VAULT_INDEX.md exists.
vault.finding: The physical-ai notes found are mostly M6/M12 era synthesis plus a 2026-06-25 daily log mentioning M28. No current public-facing M27/M28 synthesis was found.

recommendedNextActions.action: Deploy or verify the M27/M28 Vite/React Robotics Lab bundle to robotics.askewly.com.
Update Askewly project page copy from micro-dip status to simulated WBC/browser replay status with no-real-telemetry boundary.
recommendedNextActions.verification: Fetch https://askewly.com/projects/physical-ai-arm and grep for the updated G1 squat claim.

recommendedNextActions.action: Refresh vault physical-ai synthesis after live deployment is confirmed.
recommendedNextActions.verification: ssh m4 grep in the physical-ai vault folder shows current M27/M28 and M19 boundaries.

recommendedNextActions.action: Update top-level README framing from gallery/platform toward workbench/environment controls after live deploy.
recommendedNextActions.verification: README mentions workbench/environment controls without implying real robot telemetry.
